description_long: This object is a compact, pump-action shotgun with a short barrel and a black pistol grip, designed for close-quarters use. The receiver and barrel are constructed from dark, matte-finished metal, showing some subtle wear and textural variation. The pistol grip is ergonomically shaped, likely made of a durable polymer or rubberized material for improved handling. The shotgun features a tubular magazine running parallel beneath the barrel, and the pump mechanism is visible just forward of the trigger guard. The trigger guard is rounded and proportionally sized to protect the trigger while allowing easy access. The overall design is utilitarian, with minimal embellishments, emphasizing function and reliability in urban environments.
description: A compact, pump-action shotgun with a black pistol grip, short barrel, and matte metal finish. Designed for close-quarters use with a utilitarian, functional appearance.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the shotgun, including the pistol grip, trigger guard, pump, and barrel.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the muzzle, tubular magazine, and the alignment of the barrel and pump.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the pistol grip, trigger guard, and the length of the barrel and magazine tube.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the back of the pistol grip and the end of the receiver.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel with a tubular magazine beneath; no ribbing or venting visible
attribute_trigger_guard_design: rounded, medium-sized trigger guard with smooth edges and no visible finger grooves or reinforcement
